title: . Petitions in unorganized establishments. In any establishment where there is no certified
content:
. Petitions in unorganized establishments. In any establishment where there is no certified 
bargaining agent, a certification election shall automatically be conducted by the Med-Arbiter upon the filing of 
a petition by a legitimate labor organization. (As amended by Section 24, Republic Act No. 6715, March 21, 
1989)
